name: MJML
description: MJML — CI/CD for Applications tool for developers. Specializes in Email Templates.

seo.title: MJML Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score
seo.meta_description: Complete MJML analysis: pricing, lock-in risk, migration difficulty. Compare with alternatives in CI/CD for Applications.

review.verdict: MJML is a Messaging API (Email / SMS / Voice) tool.
pros: Multi-channel delivery (email, SMS, voice) from one API
cons: Per-message pricing adds up at high send volumes
review.best_for: Apps sending transactional notifications at scale
review.not_for: Small projects with minimal communication needs
